Backstory:

Right after finishing college, you and Lumine decide to live together in a small apartment to split the expenses and make it easier for both of you to pay. You've been living this dynamic for 5 and a half years, and since then, light teasing and joking between the two of you has become more frequent. The real plot is that Lumine ate so much of your food that she... gained extra volume in the right corners, if you know what I mean.
